personality: 6 Glass / Luxe structure with 2 Expressive vibrant accents
personality_one_liner: A sleek, cinematic travel companion with deep obsidian surfaces, rich glassmorphism, and vibrant sunset accents for a premium, collaborative journey.

spacing.rule: Generous cinematic spacing. Content breathes. Margins are 'lg' or 'xl' on screen roots. Cards have 'md' to 'lg' internal padding.

do's: Use heavily on sticky headers, bottom tabs, FABs, and bottom sheet handles.
Apply frosted glass overlays on featured trip hero cards over imagery.
Pair blur with translucent tinted base (>=75% surface) underneath to guarantee readability.
dont's: Never blur body text regions, form fields, or standard list rows.
Never stack more than 2 glass surfaces.

screens.name: Auth
screens.purpose: Cinematic entry to the app with email/Google login and avatar/name setup.
screens.layout: Full-bleed background image with a dark gradient scrim (top to bottom). Form inputs in translucent glass cards at the lower third.

screens.name: Trips Dashboard
screens.purpose: Overview of Upcoming and Past trips via segmented tabs, with a FAB to create/join trips.

states.empty: Illustration of luggage/globe, 'No trips yet', 'Create Trip' CTA.

screens.layout: Sticky glass header. Masonry or large vertical hero-image trip cards. Each card uses a gradient overlay, bold 'Outfit' typography for destination/dates, and glass tags.

screens.name: Trip Detail - Itinerary
screens.purpose: Vertical day-by-day timeline of the trip.
screens.layout: Sticky glass top nav with 5 tabs. Timeline layout with an 'Active Day' live banner that uses a pulsing indicator (reanimated) and live elapsed timer. Inline editing for members/admins.

screens.name: Trip Detail - Travel
screens.purpose: Display transport segments in a stunning boarding pass UI.
screens.layout: Cards with dashed/perforated separators. High contrast typography. Sections for visual route (origin -> destination) and passenger list (avatar + seat).

screens.name: Trip Detail - Expenses
screens.purpose: Ledger, Split particulars, and Transactions tracker.
screens.layout: Top segmented control (Cost Share, Particulars, Transactions). Stacked horizontal bar chart for spending categories. Fun Fact cards (e.g., 'Daily Burn Rate') as surfaceSecondary tonal blocks.

screens.name: Trip Detail - Media
screens.layout: Masonry image grid. Floating Action Button to upload. Inline emoji reactions on images.

screens.name: Trip Detail - Restaurant
screens.purpose: Collaborative dining sessions to split bills by item.
screens.layout: List of menu items with 'who ordered'. Bottom sticky glass panel for Tax/Tip sliders and Final Split total.

screens.name: Trip Wrapped
screens.layout: Full-bleed cards with heavy typography (Outfit 3xl), micro-animations (Reanimated), auto-advancing progress bars at the top, tapping left/right to navigate.

travel_boarding_pass_hero.alt: Airplane wing flying over city at sunset

restaurant_hero.alt: Friends enjoying food at a round table

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark mode base (`surface`: `#0F1115`) with vibrant `#FF6B4A` accents. Absolutely NO BLUES, strictly forbidden by guidelines.
Implement glassmorphism (`expo-blur`) for sticky headers, FABs, and the bottom nav. ALWAYS layer a 75%+ opacity tint behind the blur for foreground contrast.
Typography: Use `Outfit` for large titles and numbers (Expenses/Wrapped), `Plus Jakarta Sans` for body text. Restrict font weights to 400/500.
For the Travel tab, build a 'Boarding Pass' component. Use dashed borders or SVG cutouts to simulate perforated paper edges, paired with high-contrast typography for gates/seats.
For Expenses, stack the bar charts horizontally. Replicate modern split-app UI: show clear 'Who Owes What' lists.
Ensure the 'Active Day' banner in the Itinerary tab uses `react-native-reanimated` for a subtle pulsing indicator.
Trip Wrapped must use full-screen paging with bold typography and auto-advancing progress bars (like Spotify Wrapped).
Always apply a top-to-bottom gradient scrim (transparent to surfaceInverse) over hero background images to ensure text readability.
